items.title: How Drug Cartel Gold Ends Up at the U.S. Mint
items.summary: The U.S. Mint is legally required to sell only legal, domestic gold. Instead, it is the last link in a chain that launders foreign gold for an insatiable market. Our reporter Ju...

items.title: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
items.summary: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".
